post_hoc_F2_selection_at_kappa15.label: post hoc, run after the declared F cell saturated

corrections.note: correction recorded in-session, before any publication: cells whose cohort died before storm onset carry no mortality information; the division guard reported them as low mortality. The zero-trap: a drive with weight exactly 0 is heard as u*(0/max)^kappa = 0 forever, so fear spawned at zero is unacquirable at any kappa > 0.
corrections.P1_corrected: REFUTED on valid cells, opposite direction: kappa 0.25-1.0 at bond 0.5/1.0, sudden storm, mortality 1.000 vs 0.255 at kappa 0. Mechanism: the zero-trap (fear unhearable from a zero start) plus the tether holding the cohort in range; not focused evacuation.
corrections.P2_corrected: HOLDS on valid cells: ramp 400 bond 1.0 mortality 1.000 across kappa 0-1.0; the kappa 1.5 cell is void (0-1 agents alive at onset).
corrections.kappa15_regime_corrected: peacetime collapse, not protection: at bond 1.0, kappa 1.5, 199-200 of 200 starve before tick 2000, at home, in a world with no hazards at all. Deep place-attachment plus extreme sharpness starves its carriers in peacetime.
corrections.bond0_rows_corrected: identical mortality across all kappa > 0 because fear weight starts at exactly 0 and is zero-trapped: storm deaths reduce to geometry (whoever the storm covers), seed-identical.
corrections.P4_note: F2 post hoc cell at-risk pool 36: reduced; interpret with care
